---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new tool, config option, or improvement
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
---

**Is your feature request related to a problem?**
A clear description of the problem. E.g. "I'm frustrated when..."

**Describe the solution you'd like**
What you'd like to happen. Be as specific as possible.

**Describe alternatives you've considered**
Other approaches you've thought about.

**Tool or config area**
Which part of the extension does this affect?
- [ ] New tool
- [ ] Existing tool improvement
- [ ] Config file option
- [ ] Hook / context injection
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Other

**Additional context**
Any other info, mockups, or examples.
